content.fact_text: Implemented User domain Zod schemas, TypeScript interfaces, and transformation functions for authentication and profile management.

provenance_data.behaviour: Defines schema validation and data models for User domain. Uses Zod for runtime validation, ensuring type safety and strict input sanitization. Provides conversion logic to strip sensitive fields from internal models.
provenance_data.utility: Provides essential type safety, data validation, and PII-redaction mechanisms for the User domain, ensuring high-quality, production-ready data handling.
